sections.paragraph:
m. with suff. יִצְרֹו.-

(1) frame, formation; Psa 103:14, כִּי־הוּא יָדַע יִצְרֵנוּ “for he knoweth our frame,” i.e. knows how or whence we have been formed; hence, a thing framed, as earthenware, Isa 29:16 specially an idol, Hab 2:18.

(2) Metaph. a meditation, thought, more fully יֵצֶר לֵב Gen 8:21 6:5 Deu 31:21 יֵצֶר סָמוּךְ “a firm mind,” a firm soul, i.e. a man of firm mind, Isa 26:3 (comp. Psa 112:8).

(3) [Jezer], pr.n. of a son of Naphtali, Gen 46:24. Patron. יִצְרִי Num 26:49 which latter word is also pr.n. of another man, 1Ch 25:11 (for which there is in verse 1Ch 25:3צְרִי).
